_doc: Canonical guidance codes for structured, reusable advice snippets.

CHECK_BINDERS.description: Clarify whether preparation includes milk, butter, starches, or other added binders.
CHECK_BINDERS.title: Check added binders

FAT_WITH_CONFLICT_GROUP_TINY_AMOUNT.description: When fat is combined with KH, PROTEIN, HUELSENFRUECHTE, or MILCH, keep it to about 1-2 teaspoons.
FAT_WITH_CONFLICT_GROUP_TINY_AMOUNT.title: Keep fat very small with concentrated foods

FAT_WITH_NEUTRAL_SMALL_AMOUNT.description: With neutral foods, oils and butter should stay around 1-2 tablespoons, while nuts, seeds, and avocado can be used in a larger but still bounded amount.
FAT_WITH_NEUTRAL_SMALL_AMOUNT.title: Use moderate fat with neutral foods

GLUTEN_AWARE.description: Suitable as structured guidance for gluten-containing wheat-protein products.
GLUTEN_AWARE.title: Be gluten-aware

SMALL_AMOUNT_ONLY.description: This item is typically only acceptable in small condiment-sized portions.
SMALL_AMOUNT_ONLY.title: Use only small amounts

SOY_IN_MODERATION.description: The course material recommends being cautious with soy-based foods.
SOY_IN_MODERATION.title: Use soy in moderation

AIRFRYER_FAT_HINT.title: Heißluft statt Frittieren
AIRFRYER_FAT_HINT.description: Deutlich weniger Fett als frittiert — trotzdem Fettmenge im Blick behalten.
